meta.title: WOOdrobe — try the styles
meta.description: A fresh WordPress + WooCommerce site with WOOdrobe pre-installed and a sample product. Lands in the Site Editor on the Single Product template so you can swap WOOdrobe variants from the Styles panel.
meta.author: Regionally Famous

steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( class_exists( 'WC_Product_Simple' ) && ! get_page_by_path( 'beanie', OBJECT, 'product' ) ) { $p = new WC_Product_Simple(); $p->set_name( 'Beanie' ); $p->set_slug( 'beanie' ); $p->set_status( 'publish' ); $p->set_regular_price( '20' ); $p->set_sale_price( '18' ); $p->set_short_description( 'Soft, hand-knit, ready for a chilly day.' ); $p->set_description( "Hand-finished in small batches from full-grain merino wool. Each piece develops a unique patina with use \u2014 softening at the edges and deepening in tone over the first few months of wear.\n\nStitched with waxed Tiger thread and finished with a brushed-felt brim. Designed to last decades, not seasons." ); $p->set_sku( 'woo-beanie' ); $p->set_weight( '0.2' ); $p->set_dimensions( array( 'length' => '21', 'width' => '11', 'height' => '2' ) ); $p->save(); }

options.blogdescription: A wardrobe of block-style outfits for WooCommerce blocks
